title: Darken continents to near-black and sharpen background

requirements.text: In AnimatedWorldMap.tsx, change the continent fill/outline color from blue to near-black (e.g., #0a0a0a or #111111) so continents match the Black, Gold & White theme instead of appearing blue.

quotes: The contintents are blue make them darker and black

acceptanceCriteria: Continents on the animated world map render in a near-black color, not blue
Continent color is visually consistent with the Black, Gold & White theme

requirements.text: Reduce pixelation and blurriness on the hero background in Home.tsx and any related background image or canvas rendering. Ensure the background appears sharp and crisp — use higher-resolution rendering, avoid CSS scaling artifacts, and set image-rendering to crisp or pixelated where appropriate.

quotes: its still blurry please clear up the background so its let pixelated

acceptanceCriteria: The hero section background is visually sharp with no noticeable pixelation or blur
Background does not appear stretched or scaled in a lossy way
Sharpness is consistent across common viewport sizes

constraints: Do not alter the Black, Gold & White color palette or overall theme
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
nonGoals: Adding new features or sections to the home page
Modifying the gold pulsing dots or arc animations
